note: CASE-437: the KB write/ingest client, owned by APP-KB-YAC and served from the running KB instance. A client MUST compare its schema_version against the instance manifest before writing and refuse on mismatch (no-skew guarantee). v1 = case_number identity (current live model); v2 (CASE-425) flips to document_id/UUID identity + CASE-<n> Registry synonym + identity_fields:[].
